family.name: IEA
family.description: IEA World Energy Outlook scenarios for the steel sector

scenarios.name: Net Zero Emissions by 2050 (NZE)
scenarios.description: Global net-zero CO2 by 2050. Most ambitious. Rapid scale-up of H2-DRI, CCUS, scrap-EAF.

scenarios.name: Announced Pledges Scenario (APS)
scenarios.description: All government net-zero pledges and NDCs met on time. Moderate ambition.

scenarios.name: Stated Policies Scenario (STEPS)
scenarios.description: Only currently enacted policies. Business-as-usual with existing measures.
